---
title: Создание темы
description: Как написать свою тему для Noctis
---

import { Step, Steps } from 'fumadocs-ui/components/steps';

# Создание темы

<Steps>
  <Step>

### Создай папку

<Files>
  <Folder name="themes" defaultOpen>
    <Folder name="my_theme" defaultOpen>
      <File name="colors.dart" />
      <File name="text_styles.dart" />
      <File name="theme.dart" />
      <File name="routes.dart" />
      <Folder name="screens" />
      <Folder name="widgets" />
    </Folder>
  </Folder>
</Files>

  </Step>

  <Step>

### Реализуй AppTheme

```dart
import '../contract.dart';

class MyTheme implements AppTheme {
  @override
  String get splashRoute => '/';

  @override
  String get authRoute => '/auth';

  @override
  String get homeRoute => '/home';

  @override
  ThemeData get themeData => ThemeData(
    brightness: Brightness.dark,
    colorScheme: ColorScheme.dark(
      primary: Colors.purple,
      surface: const Color(0xFF1E1E2E),
    ),
  );

  @override
  List<RouteBase> buildRoutes() {
    return [
      GoRoute(path: '/', builder: (_, __) => const MySplashScreen()),
      GoRoute(path: '/auth', builder: (_, __) => const MyAuthScreen()),
      GoRoute(path: '/home', builder: (_, __) => const MyHomeScreen()),
    ];
  }

  @override
  Widget wrapShell(Widget child) => child;
}
```

  </Step>

  <Step>

### Переключи active.dart

```dart
export 'my_theme/theme.dart' show MyTheme;
```

И обнови `activeThemeProvider` в `core/di/providers.dart`:

```dart
final activeThemeProvider = Provider<AppTheme>((ref) {
  return MyTheme();
});
```

  </Step>

  <Step>

### Экраны

Каждый экран получает данные через Riverpod-провайдеры из `core/di/`. Адаптер, репозитории, use cases — всё доступно через `ref.watch`.

Минимальный экран:

```dart
class MyHomeScreen extends ConsumerWidget {
  const MyHomeScreen({super.key});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final servers = ref.watch(serversProvider);
    return servers.when(
      data: (list) => ListView(...),
      loading: () => const CircularProgressIndicator(),
      error: (e, _) => Text('Error: $e'),
    );
  }
}
```

  </Step>
</Steps>
